home.headline: The seal for senior-friendly businesses
home.subline: Show your customers that your business takes special care of the needs of older people — visible, credible, and certified.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.pending: This privacy policy is being reviewed and completed by a lawyer.
privacy.p1: [Company name, address, contact — see legal notice]
privacy.p2: We collect and process the following personal data when you use our services: name, email address, company data, and payment information (processed by Mollie B.V.).
privacy.p3: The data is used exclusively for providing our certification service, communicating with you, and processing payments.
privacy.p4: Data is only shared with service providers necessary for our services (Clerk Inc. for authentication, Mollie B.V. for payments, Brevo SAS for email delivery). All partners are contractually obligated to comply with GDPR.
privacy.p5: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, and data portability. Please contact us at [email address].
privacy.p6: This website uses cookies. Your consent is obtained via Cookiebot. Analytics data is collected via Google Analytics 4 only with your consent.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.pending: These terms are being reviewed and completed by a lawyer.
terms.s1p: These General Terms and Conditions apply to all contracts between Seniorenfreundlich.org ([Company name]) and companies acquiring the Seniorenfreundlich seal.
terms.s2p: Seniorenfreundlich.org grants, for a one-time fee, the "Seniorenfreundlich Seal" as a digital certificate (Open Badge). The seal entitles the holder to use the associated mark in their own communications for the duration of the active seal.
terms.s3p: The contract is formed upon completion of the ordering process on the platform and successful payment. Payment is made once through the payment service provider Mollie B.V.
terms.s4p: Consumers have the statutory right of withdrawal. For more details, see the
terms.s5p: [Disclaimer and liability limitations — to be completed by a lawyer]
terms.s6p: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies.

cancellation.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellation.pending: This cancellation policy is being reviewed and completed by a lawyer.
cancellation.p_right1: You have the right to withdraw from this contract within fourteen days without giving any reason. The withdrawal period is fourteen days from the date the contract was concluded.
cancellation.p_right2: To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us ([Company name], [Address], [Email]) of your decision to withdraw from this contract by means of a clear declaration (e.g., a letter sent by post or an email).
cancellation.p_consequences: If you withdraw from this contract, we shall reimburse all payments received from you promptly and no later than fourteen days from the day on which we receive notice of your withdrawal.
cancellation.p_expiry: The right of withdrawal expires prematurely if we have begun performance of the service and you have expressly agreed that we may begin performance before the withdrawal period has expired, and you have acknowledged that you will lose your right of withdrawal upon our commencement of performance of the contract.

onboarding.step2Subtitle: Fill in your company details. You can update them anytime in the dashboard.
onboarding.step3Subtitle: We will send a 6-digit code to your company email to confirm you are authorised to represent the company.
onboarding.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
onboarding.labelEmailHint: The verification code will be sent to this address.
onboarding.skipHint: You can complete verification later in the dashboard.
onboarding.verificationBannerDesc: Confirm your company email to fully activate your profile.

profile.title: Company Profile
profile.subtitle: This information appears on your public company page.

profile.logoHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP or SVG · max. 2 MB

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: One-time activation of the Seniorenfreundlich seal for €99.00.
billing.badgeAlready: Your company already has an active seal.
billing.errorNoCheckout: Checkout could not be started. Please try again.
billing.notVerified: Your company must be verified before purchasing a seal.
billing.notVerifiedGate: Your company profile is not yet verified. Verification is required before you can purchase a seal.

badge.title: Badge
badge.noBadgeCta: Purchase a badge on the billing page →
badge.revokeConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. The seal will be immediately withdrawn and will appear publicly as revoked.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.
auth.passwordErrorWeak: Password does not meet all requirements.
auth.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email address and we’ll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotSuccess: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent.
auth.resetSuccess: Password changed successfully. You can now sign in.
auth.resetInvalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

security.title: Account
security.emailSuccess: A confirmation link has been sent to your new address. Click it to confirm the change.
security.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

actions.revokeBadgeDesc: This will immediately revoke the company's active badge. The public certificate page will show it as revoked.
actions.issueBadgeDesc: Issue a new active badge for this company. Any previous badge will be superseded.
actions.resetVerificationDesc: This will set the company back to 'unverified'. The owner will need to go through verification again.
actions.deleteDesc: Permanently delete this company and all associated data. The company must not have an active badge.

actions.markRefundedDesc: This will mark the order as refunded and revoke any active badge for the associated company.

actions.revokeDesc: This will revoke this specific badge immediately.
actions.reactivateDesc: This will reactivate this revoked badge.

actions.promoteDesc: This user will have full access to the admin panel.
actions.demoteDesc: This user will lose admin panel access.
actions.banDesc: The user will not be able to sign in. Their data is not deleted.
actions.unbanDesc: The user will regain access to their account.
